90.title: Soulmates
90.desc: This compatibility is truly remarkable! You were born for each other — a fated connection. Together, you can overcome anything.

80.title: Perfect Partners
80.desc: Top-tier compatibility! You bring out each other's strengths and fill in each other's gaps — truly the perfect pair.

70.title: Perfectly Matched
70.desc: You get along wonderfully! You give each other comfort and naturally complement one another.

60.title: Growing Together
60.desc: You grow together as a couple! By learning from each other's differences, you can become better versions of yourselves.

50.title: Effort Couple
50.desc: This relationship needs a little more effort. If you both genuinely want to understand each other, you can build something great.

40.title: Opposites Attract
40.desc: Your opposite charms draw you together! The differences make it exciting, and you can show each other new worlds.

0.title: Challenging Pair
0.desc: It's not an easy relationship, but love is built through effort! The will to truly understand each other is what matters most.

high: Your personalities match amazingly well. Being together feels natural and comfortable.
You two are a great personality match. Your values and lifestyles are very similar.
You deeply understand and respect each other's personalities. Conflicts are easily resolved.
Your personality compatibility is outstanding! Your strengths and weaknesses perfectly complement each other.
Your personalities fit together like puzzle pieces. The more time you spend together, the better you mesh.
medium: There are similarities and differences in your personalities. It's a balanced relationship.
Your different personalities sometimes create synergy and sometimes cause friction.
Acknowledging and caring about your personality differences will make the relationship even better.
You both have your own unique qualities. Respecting each other's differences is key.
There are areas where your personalities need adjustment, but with effort you can be a great team.
low: There are personality differences, but that can actually be your charm.
Understanding each other's different personalities may take time. Practice patience.
Even with different personalities, if you love each other, you can find a way to adapt.
Personality differences can cause misunderstandings — communicate more frequently.
You need to view each other's different personalities as strengths.

high: Your dating styles match perfectly! You naturally know what the other wants and express it.
Your romantic chemistry is amazing! Every moment together feels special.
Your ways of expressing love align perfectly. It's a relationship full of affection.
Your romantic compatibility is the best! You both know how to make each other's heart flutter.
Whenever you're together, a special atmosphere is created. The best romantic chemistry.
medium: Your dating styles differ slightly, but the process of adapting to each other can be enjoyable.
Learning and understanding each other's approaches to romance can deepen the relationship.
You may want slightly different things in love. Honest conversation helps.
Some parts of your dating patterns match, some don't. Balance is key.
To improve your romantic compatibility, try understanding each other's ways of expressing feelings.
low: Your dating styles are quite different. Respecting each other's approach is important.
Wanting different things from romance can sometimes feel frustrating. Work it out through conversation.
To improve romantic compatibility, learn each other's love languages.
Different dating styles can cause conflict — understanding and consideration are needed.
Acknowledging the differences in your approaches to romance and making an effort to adapt is necessary.

high: Your communication is truly excellent! You understand each other even without words.
Your communication styles match perfectly. With every conversation you grow closer.
You're each other's best communication partners — freely expressing emotions and thoughts.
Conversation is natural and comfortable. You can talk honestly about any topic.
In both words and actions, you perfectly understand each other.
medium: Communication is generally good, but misunderstandings can arise occasionally.
Understanding each other's communication styles better will allow for smoother conversation.
Practicing direct expression for important topics can be helpful.
A little more effort in communication can make the relationship much deeper.
Conversations can feel awkward at times, but with effort things can improve greatly.
low: There can be communication difficulties. Talk more often and more honestly.
Different ways of expressing yourselves make misunderstandings easy. Empathy is needed.
To bridge communication style differences, learn each other's language.
Different ways of expressing feelings can feel frustrating. Practice patience.
To improve communication compatibility, practice listening without judgment.

high: Your visions for the future perfectly align! The future you dream of together will be beautiful.
Your life goals and values match well. The future together is something to look forward to.
Your future compatibility is the best! You're the kind of couple who can make important life decisions together.
Your future plans naturally come together. It's a relationship where you can grow together.
The futures you want are similar. You can walk forward looking in the same direction.
medium: Your thoughts on the future are somewhat similar but there are differences too.
It would be good to have enough conversation about each other's future goals.
Your plans for the future may differ somewhat. Respecting each other's dreams is important.
To improve future compatibility, you need time to set life goals together.
Your directions for the future may differ slightly — start talking early.
low: Your views on the future are quite different. A serious conversation is needed.
Differences in life goals and values can lead to conflict later on.
You absolutely need time to share and align your future plans.
An effort to understand the other person's dreams and goals is needed for future compatibility.
Even if you differ now, the process of building a future together is what matters. Talk often.

high: You two are connected like fate! Your meeting itself feels like a miracle.
Everything — star signs, names — points to this meeting. It's a destined relationship.
It feels like the universe connected you two! This meeting was meant to be.
A strong sense of destiny is felt from your names. A truly special connection.
You're connected by the thread of fate! Together you can overcome any hardship.
medium: You have a certain connection. Cherish and nurture this meeting.
A connection made from many coincidences. Build your destiny together.
Rather than fate, this is a relationship built by choice — which can make it even more valuable.
The thread of connection is there, but strengthening it depends on both your efforts.
There's a sense of destiny between you. Cherishing each other can make it even more special.
low: This is a relationship built more by effort than fate — which can make it more meaningful.
The thread of connection is thin, but through mutual effort you can build a strong bond.
It doesn't have to be fate! Love created by choice can be more beautiful.
For this meeting to become destiny, sincere effort from both of you is needed.
Even if the fate score is low, both of your wills can change everything.

high: Getting to know each other even more deeply will make the relationship even better. It's already the best, and it can get even better — amazing!
Nurture this beautiful connection. Every moment together will become a special memory.
Express gratitude to each other often. Don't lose the caring heart you have now for one another.
Your relationship is truly special. People around you will be moved by your chemistry.
This level of compatibility is truly rare! Cherish each other for life.
Together, you can achieve anything. Support each other's dreams.
medium: Practice seeing each other's differences as strengths. Differences are what make you attractive.
Communicate more often and share your thoughts. The deeper the understanding, the better the compatibility.
Be thankful and complimentary even over small things. Positive energy makes relationships better.
Create new experiences together. Shared memories will bring you closer.
Make a habit of thinking of each other's strengths first. The relationship will improve noticeably.
Be on each other's side even in difficult moments. That's what true partnership is.
low: The feelings you have for each other matter more than the score right now. Don't give up!
Even with differences, love is enough. Don't stop the effort to understand each other.
It's okay to have many differences. It means there's a lot to learn from each other.
It's not an easy relationship, but it can become all the more special. Work on it together.
True love overcomes compatibility scores. The love you have for each other is what matters most.
The strongest bond is forged when you overcome a difficult relationship together. Take on the challenge!
